FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F STG_CSF_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F,
(
select PERSON_ID ,EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F
minus
select PERSON_ID ,EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,EFFECTIVE_END_DATE,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F
) ACM
where 
 ACM.PERSON_ID = STG_CSF_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.PERSON_ID and ACM.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE=STG_CSF_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
 AND ACM.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = STG_CSF_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.REFRESH_DATETIME
